products.title: VEELUX Men’s Luxury Rhinestone Flannel Shirt – Black & White Plaid
products.body_html:
The VEELUX Men’s Luxury Rhinestone Flannel Shirt delivers elevated streetwear styling with premium detailing and a bold oversized look. Designed with heavyweight plaid fabric, rhinestone embellishments, and signature VEELUX branding, this flannel blends luxury fashion with everyday versatility.

Perfect for layering over tees, styling with denim, or creating standout streetwear fits.

Features:
• Premium heavyweight flannel fabric
• Rhinestone embellishment detailing
• Oversized relaxed fit
• Signature VEELUX back logo design
• Button-up front closure
• Dual chest pockets
• Soft premium feel for everyday comfort

Perfect For:
• Luxury streetwear styling
• Layered fashion outfits
• Casual everyday wear
• Travel & nightlife fits
• Fall & winter fashion

Fit:
Oversized / Relaxed Fit
For a slimmer fit, size down.

Color:
Black & White Plaid

Available Sizes:
Small, Medium, Large

Complete your luxury streetwear look with VEELUX signature fashion essentials.

products.title: StarPower Hoodies
products.body_html: "Conquer the crowd with our Starpower Rhinestone Hoodies - perfect for clubs, music videos, and special events!"

products.title: Stacked Denim Jeans
products.body_html:
Simplicity. Style. Everyday Comfort.

Meet your new favorite go-to: the Plain Jean. Designed for those who appreciate minimalism and a flawless fit, this jean keeps things classic and versatile. Whether you're dressing it up or down, it delivers a clean look that works with everything in your closet.

Details:

  • High-quality denim with just the right stretch
  • Mid-rise waist with a straight or slim leg (adjust per your product)
  • No distressing, no fuss — just timeless design
  • Functional pockets and sturdy hardware
  • Made for all-day comfort and everyday wear

Style Tip: Pair it with anything from tees and hoodies to button-downs or boots — it’s built for endless outfit combos.

Because simple never goes out of style.

products.title: Rhinestone Star Power Jean
products.body_html:
Shine Like You Were Born to Stand Out ⭐

Unleash your inner star with our Rhinestone Star Power Jean — where edgy meets glam in the boldest way possible. These jeans aren’t just denim; they’re a statement. Featuring eye-catching rhinestone star embellishments, this pair is designed to turn sidewalks into runways and everyday moments into main character energy.

Details:

  • Premium stretch denim for a flattering, comfortable fit
  • Glittering rhinestone star accents that demand attention
  • Classic 5-pocket design with modern flair
  • Durable and machine-wash safe on gentle cycle

Style Tip: Rock it with a crop top, graphic tee, or blazer for that effortless glam-street vibe. Add heels or sneakers — either way, you’re the star of the show.

Dare to shine. Own the spotlight.

products.title: Rhinestone Jean Jacket
products.body_html:
Timeless Cool, Everyday Edge 🧥

Classic never goes out of style. Our Jean Jacket is your go-to layer for effortless style, no matter the season. Made from high-quality denim with a modern cut, this jacket brings that perfect blend of rugged edge and casual confidence. Whether you’re dressing it up or keeping it low-key, it’s the layer your wardrobe’s been waiting for.

Features:

  • Durable, premium denim with a soft, broken-in feel
  • Tailored fit with room to layer
  • Button-front closure and chest pockets for classic detail
  • Reinforced seams for long-lasting wear

Style Tip: Throw it over a hoodie, graphic tee, or dress — it instantly levels up any outfit.

Built to last. Styled to flex.

products.title: StarPower Power Shirt
products.body_html:
Shine Boldly in Every Step ✨

Turn heads and own the spotlight with our Rhinestone Shirt — a perfect fusion of sparkle and style. This statement piece is crafted from premium, breathable fabric and adorned with dazzling rhinestones that catch the light just right. Whether you’re dressing up for a night out, a special event, or just want to add some glam to your everyday look, this shirt makes sure all eyes are on you.

Features:

  • High-quality cotton or cotton-blend for all-day comfort
  • Hand-placed rhinestones for maximum sparkle and durability
  • Flattering unisex fit (or specify: women’s fit/men’s cut depending on your target)
  • Dry Clean Only

Style Tip: Pair it with your favorite jeans or leather skirt and let your outfit do the talking.
